headline: Bride Cancels Wedding After Groom Says 'I Guess' When Asked 'Do You Take This Woman?'
summary: The groom claims he was 'going for casual confidence' and 'messed up the tone.'
fullBody: Bridezilla Chillmore walked out mid-ceremony when her fiancé responded to 'do you take this woman?' with 'I guess so, yeah.' 'It wasn't a rom-com,' Chillmore said from her parents' basement. 'It was a disaster.' The groom, Chad Noncommittal, has since issued a statement: 'I meant yes enthusiastically. I just have resting ambivalence face.' The wedding cake was donated to a shelter, where it was described as 'delicious but slightly awkward.'
